label: New
items: Valve state history — the device history panel now shows a timeline of every open and close event, with time, duration, and whether it was triggered by a schedule or manually

label: Fixed
items: Automations were never firing — a missing configuration setting meant the scheduled trigger was being rejected silently
Automations with no task gate set were incorrectly skipping instead of always running
Running an automation manually no longer creates phantom tasks — if no watering tasks are due today, a single generic record is created instead
Water valves now turn off correctly after the set duration — the turn-off command is now sent explicitly rather than relying on a countdown the device was ignoring
Automations skipped due to rain now send a notification and appear correctly in the run history with the forecasted rainfall amount
Water valves no longer show as offline on the device list — the online indicator now checks whether the valve is linked rather than using a stale last-seen timestamp
